notes: Rejected as a dev-unlocking test plan because the referenced App Shell visual draft is not locked for dev. Keep the IA and P0 shell ideas, but refresh visual QA cases after a high-fidelity source-aligned Figma/export passes design review.
capability_thresholds: C-2 private_card_generated / compose_started >= 55% north star, minimum 45% gate
C-4 share-worthy card blind test >= 6/10, including ordinary UGC
C-5 verification-later boundary understood by >= 8/10 and unverified same-flight publish/comment/notification blocked
C-6 offline_sync_completed / offline_sync_started >= 95% with zero lost drafts
C-7 zero public PII or exact seat exposure
C-8 post-onboarding 4-entry app shell: Today / Flight Book / Write / Discover are reachable without back-stack unwinding, Write is center primary action, no fifth tab
funnel_gates: private_card_generated / compose_started >= 55% north star, 45% minimum gate

removed_gates: capture_started / landing_viewed as primary activation gate

hard_no_go_conditions: Writing or private Cloud Card generation is blocked by flight verification
Unverified users can publish/comment/receive same-flight notifications
Offline draft or queued card can be lost
Public surfaces expose exact seat, name, ticket number, ID/passport, phone, or raw proof content
Cloud Card includes App Store badge or hard download CTA
Any baseline analytics event or PRD 13.3 critical event is missing
Post-onboarding app lacks the approved 4-entry shell or forces users to unwind a back stack between Today / Flight Book / Write / Discover
reject_note: Blocked by design correction: test plan must be refreshed after final high-fidelity visual source is approved
